goal: Assess the size of the Indian SaaS market.

research_results.title: India SaaS Market 2024
research_results.content: The Indian SaaS market reached USD 15 billion in 2024 according to a survey of public companies.

research_results.title: Forecast Report
research_results.content: The Indian SaaS market was only USD 3 billion in 2024, with no methodology disclosed.

goal: Compare two CRM competitors on pricing.

research_results.title: Vendor A Pricing
research_results.content: Vendor A starts at $49 per user per month and does not offer a free plan.

research_results.title: Vendor A Review
research_results.content: Vendor A has a free plan and starts paid plans at $19 per user per month.

research_results.title: Vendor B
research_results.content: Vendor B is the cheapest CRM in the world, according to unnamed users.

goal: Research AI regulation for enterprise software.

research_results.title: EU AI Act Guide
research_results.content: The EU AI Act requires risk management obligations for high-risk AI systems.

research_results.title: Opinion Blog
research_results.content: The EU AI Act creates no obligations for enterprise software companies. This post cites no sources.

research_results.title: Funding News
research_results.content: The company raised a $50 million Series B in March 2025.

research_results.title: Company Profile
research_results.content: The company has never raised outside capital and remains bootstrapped.

goal: Evaluate customer sentiment for a product.

research_results.title: Review Aggregator A
research_results.content: Customers consistently praise support responsiveness and onboarding quality.

research_results.title: Review Aggregator B
research_results.content: Customers consistently complain that support is slow and onboarding is poor.
